name: compliance-event-logger
description: Spring Boot 4.0.5 + Java 21 service for logging compliance events from an upstream service. Includes Flyway migrations (v2.3.8 schema), virtual threads, ShedLock, Resilience4j, Micrometer, OpenAPI, structured Logback, and 4-environment config.

dbServerName.prompt: Default DB server name (override per environment)

eapiBaseUrl.prompt: Default EAPI base URL (override per environment)
